hook.summary: A man in a trench coat slaps people in a hallway, synced to game score increases.
hook.visual_action: A man in a black trench coat slaps several men in a hallway, with game overlays showing scores and combos.
hook.text_overlay: When you thought you were the big brother in Block Blast, you met...

scene_flow: Man in a trench coat slaps a series of men in a hallway, synced to block placement sounds.
Game overlays show the slapper's high score vs the victims' lower scores.
The slapper encounters a man with a higher score and gets hit back.
Final screen displays the game logo and app store download links.
on_screen_text: When you thought you were the big brother in Block Blast, you met...
audience_proxy: Young men who enjoy competitive casual games and meme-style humor.
